title: Anthropolgy Club Pack
description:
Vanilla Perfected but with added mods for a more involved experience!

Its spelled wrong cause we're cool like that.
body:
Vanilla Perfected but with added mods for a more involved experience! Most of what you'll find are graphical changes, performance enhancers and some server side client QOL mods. This pack is mostly so the Anthropology Club of UT Arlington can have an easier time to update their pack :) so if you need any personal help, please understand I may not be able to help you any time soon.

This modpack includes but is not limited to:

Dungeons And Taverns
Paladin Furniture
Husk Homes
Panda Archaeology
Call your horse
Hostile Mobs Improve over time
+ Much more
